想to作者：更新慢一点没关系，最重要希望质量保持的，还有一点有坚持，好书不多，只求能活[快哭了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722519871,"group_id":"7322091667794693182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阿巴阿巴","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8pnS+A1GJGMqMA02LuWbAUJ38ULyMLBs1bQ55NP6Lex","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b890e171574a47ff9ac996e4ed16bc82~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706635&x-signature=tc3Ux67rXfGTBXWYp7lfRw%2BiLEg%3D","user_id":"2233813088091837","user_name":"鸿梦酱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2233813088091837","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322091667794693182","book_info":{"abstract":"人间烟火气，最抚凡人心。
【美食+摆摊＋轻松向+大量烹饪常识＋摆摊指南+慢节奏日常＋详细菜谱＋无后宫＋作者是真想教会读者做菜】
　　陈枫学厨多年，精通川鲁粤淮四大菜系，成为龙国最年轻【国宴大师】头衔获得者。
　　穿越平行世界，觉醒【摆摊系统】。
　　但系统发布任务的难度竟然是以原主的厨艺水平为参考。
　　【新手任务：成功煮熟一碗泡面。】【奖励：现金一万元】
　　身为国宴大师的陈枫看着系统任务栏里的一系列任务，哭笑不得：【获得一名顾客的好评】、【成功煮出一枚溏心蛋】、【成功制作一碗阳春面】……
　　江北市，多了一个神秘的小摊，并且销售的菜品也越来越离谱。
　　“我反正以前从来没见过能卖文思豆腐、开水白菜、油爆双脆的小吃摊。”——某食客。
　　“我摆摊完全是依靠自己的厨艺，这个系统不太聪明的样子。”——陈枫
　　（作者为描写菜谱查询了许多资料，有条件的书友可以试着根据书中描写复刻菜品。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d6948b100bd686c3586c8569a62c9791","author":"油炸山楂","author_id":"","book_id":"7322091667794693182","book_name":"国宴大师摆摊，治愈万千食客","book_short_name":"烟火抚人心","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7322092628617478718","read_count":"18192","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"423817"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"278","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,美食,单女主,搞笑轻松,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/50d2910f354f123e0971a1cc9d103a10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364175&x-signature=%2BFQQ8jWgYyyhzOJ6IgYs5RgvSCs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1750895503350631","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"128"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221949352112C32DDCC4B9BE6C4B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8754,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":15879},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1722817386,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7359365572283417368","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的是真的好，有考据，也有讲解食材的作用，确实是在番茄不可多得的精品，如果后面照着这个步伐来看的话，这本小说到完结的话，最少也是个良草，描写菜系也很有讲究，这本小说算是我看过的所有关于美食小说里面最好的那一档了，更新有点慢，但如果保持这个质量写下去的话，我觉得封神指日可待，总之就一句话，作者牛p，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713490899,"group_id":"7322091667794693182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"..........","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dqM+DiTjbRuxth+4CchQAifmYcsy0/s1a/Pey5EHnV","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f59afa616b63431abf1d2f3288fb4ee1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710706&x-signature=Jbw1Do%2FDT2KII1BrJLCRV6CO67Q%3D","user_id":"4146976839974808","user_name":"我是高地保安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4146976839974808","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7322091667794693182","book_info":{"abstract":"人间烟火气，最抚凡人心。
【美食+摆摊＋轻松向+大量烹饪常识＋摆摊指南+慢节奏日常＋详细菜谱＋无后宫＋作者是真想教会读者做菜】
　　陈枫学厨多年，精通川鲁粤淮四大菜系，成为龙国最年轻【国宴大师】头衔获得者。
　　穿越平行世界，觉醒【摆摊系统】。
　　但系统发布任务的难度竟然是以原主的厨艺水平为参考。
　　【新手任务：成功煮熟一碗泡面。】【奖励：现金一万元】
　　身为国宴大师的陈枫看着系统任务栏里的一系列任务，哭笑不得：【获得一名顾客的好评】、【成功煮出一枚溏心蛋】、【成功制作一碗阳春面】……
　　江北市，多了一个神秘的小摊，并且销售的菜品也越来越离谱。
　　“我反正以前从来没见过能卖文思豆腐、开水白菜、油爆双脆的小吃摊。”——某食客。
　　“我摆摊完全是依靠自己的厨艺，这个系统不太聪明的样子。”——陈枫
